base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dracula_phase_1_teleport_idle — a character (boss) from 1986 castlevania. Dracula Phase 1 — count in red cape. 4-frame materialize-teleport-shoot-dematerialize cycle. Stands on platform, opens cape, throws 3-way red fireball spread, then teleports. 16 hits to expose phase 2. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dracula Phase 1 — count in red cape. 4-frame materialize-teleport-shoot-dematerialize cycle. Stands on platform, opens cape, throws 3-way red fireball spread, then teleports. 16 hits to expose phase 2
